currentProjectDescription: In addition, I am currently in charge of a Travel app at Scholastico, developed with React Native, successfully finishing the new version, and a new app for the operators.

experiences.description: I provided technical support to customers in English and Spanish, resolving software and hardware related issues to improve the customer experience.
Web development and apps. Collaboration in the design, improving the user experience and user interface, as well as creating dashboards for data management.
Independent work as a developer, collaborating with various clients on customized software development projects.
